name: Mythic Greater Dispel Magic
citation: Source text/page reference preserved in Optimization Codex v1.4
summary: Roll twice against non-mythic effects, reroll mythic failures with power, automatic non-mythic counterspelling, and immediate-action augment.

name: Dispel Synergy (Mythic)
summary: Extends Dispel Synergy to allied spells and prolongs the benefit for Demidius.

name: Destructive Dispel (Mythic)
summary: Improves the disabling rider after a successful dispel.

name: Make Your Own Luck
source: Mythic Hero's Handbook / Mythic Minis Trickster II
citation: Source/page preserved in Optimization Codex v1.4
summary: Converts competence, insight, or morale bonuses into luck bonuses, enabling Fate's Favored synergy under the campaign ruling.

name: Inexplicable Luck (Mythic)
summary: Provides a large emergency bonus before or after a decisive d20 roll.

name: High Clerist
summary: Grants or upgrades Leadership, improves Diplomacy, and supports religious construction and crusades.

name: Bound by Honor
summary: Can convert a monk vow into additional daily mythic power and provides protection against effects that violate vows.

name: Ever Ready
summary: Always act in surprise rounds and gain defense against readied actions.

name: Genre Savvy
summary: Improves creature identification and can bypass DR or energy resistance briefly.

name: Versatile Skill Mastery
summary: Grants skill mastery in tier-many skills and permits rapid reassignment at high tier.

name: Bon Vivant
summary: Free extravagant lifestyle and bonuses to local, nobility, and gather information.

name: Spectacular Death
summary: Spend remaining mythic power for final actions when killed or permanently incapacitated.

name: Dramatic Reveal
source: Mythic Minis 16: Universal Path Abilities II
summary: Conceals a signature identity from peers and grants a strong reveal bonus to Diplomacy or Intimidate.

name: Planar Scholar
source: Mythic Minis 16: Universal Path Abilities II
summary: Detects and deciphers portals, improves planar divinations and plane shift accuracy, and grants entry bonuses.

name: Contingency Plan
source: Mythic Minis 16: Universal Path Abilities II
summary: Uses contingency as a spell-like ability and permits a companion spell from a scroll or other spell-completion item.

name: Eternal Youth
source: Mythic Minis 16: Universal Path Abilities II
summary: Progressively ignores aging penalties, becomes immune to unnatural aging, and changes apparent age.

name: Planar Savant
source: Mythic Minis 16: Universal Path Abilities II
summary: Provides planar survival, anti-banishment defenses, directional sense, and planar divination tools.

name: Companion Mythic Ability
recommendation: Search mythic monster abilities before selection
source: Mythic Minis 16: Universal Path Abilities II
summary: Grants a companion or cohort one mythic monster special ability appropriate to its creature type.

name: Echoing Spell (Mythic)
summary: After casting an echoing spell, use it once later that day as a component-free spell-like ability.

name: Piercing Spell (Mythic)
summary: Reduces effective spell resistance by 5 plus mythic scaling.

name: Jinxed Spell (Mythic)
summary: Applies jinx to multiple failed targets and can pressure one successful saver.

name: Stealspell
summary: Disrupt a spell with an attack, spend mythic power, and complete the stolen spell yourself.

name: Role Reversal
summary: Reverse a failed charm, compulsion, or social influence effect back onto its creator.

name: False Allegiance
summary: Resist influence and convince the enemy it succeeded, becoming treated as an ally until you act.

name: Ability Focus (Mythic)
summary: Raises Ability Focus further and can force two saves, taking the lower result.

name: Ascendant Spell-like Ability (Mythic)
source: Mythic Minis 5: Feats of Monstrous Magic
summary: Allows a qualifying SLA to use the mythic version three times per day without mythic power.

name: Quicken Spell-like Ability (Mythic)
source: Mythic Minis 5: Feats of Monstrous Magic
summary: Improves repeated quickening and can quicken a different qualifying SLA by spending daily uses.

name: Inspired Spell
summary: Spend mythic power to cast an unprepared divine spell; uniquely broad under the campaign wizard-as-divine ruling.

name: Eldritch Breach
summary: Roll twice on caster-level checks to dispel, overcome SR, or determine whether magic affects a target.

name: Divine Metamastery
summary: Apply selected metamagic without increasing spell level or casting time for a duration.

name: Enduring Blessing
summary: Extends a qualifying willing-target buff to 24 hours.

name: Flexible Counterspell
recommendation: Recommended unless redundant with mythic GDM
summary: Immediate-action counterspell using an identified spell and a slot of sufficient level.

name: Wandering Weather
citation: Ultimate Wilderness PDF p. 238 / printed p. 237
summary: Mobile control weather suitable for carrying selected weather with a moving galleon; numerical ship speed remains a campaign ruling.

name: Billow the Sail
citation: Book of Lost Spells PDF p. 26 / printed p. 25
summary: Provides one sailing ship continual favorable wind and an explicit 25 percent speed increase for 1 hour per caster level.

name: Calculated Luck
recommendation: Prepare for planned repeated caster-level checks
citation: Occult Mysteries PDF pp. 52-53 / printed pp. 50-51
summary: Can grant a campaign-enhanced luck bonus to repeated caster-level checks but has a random assignment and energy-vulnerability cost.
